title: Ubiquiti UACC-OFC-M2-LULU-30M - optical patch cord LCupc/LCupc, Duplex, Multi-mode 50/125, 30m
category: Ubiquiti UACC-OFC-M2-LULU-30M - optical patch cord LCupc/LCupc, Duplex,…
description: Optical cable suitable for connecting both active and passive devices. It uses singlemode 50/125 (OM4) fiber, terminated with two LC connectors on both ends. The total cable diameter is 2mm The ferrule polishing is in UPC (Ultra Physical Contact) style. The sheath is LSZH (Low Smoke Zero Halogen) The cable length is 30m GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
